summary: Executed targeted backend + frontend testing for new project media features on public preview URL. Verified clickable project cards (desktop route + mobile modal), Studio media manager, URL media addition, direct upload flow, upload content serving, and PUT portfolio media persistence.
action_items: Move hardcoded backend storage prefix (APP_STORAGE_PREFIX) to environment variable for safer multi-environment deployments.
Refactor blocking requests calls in async FastAPI routes to non-blocking HTTP client (or threadpool) to avoid event-loop blocking under load.
Split /app/frontend/src/pages/studio-page.jsx (>700 lines) into smaller modules/components for maintainability.
critical_code_review_comments: backend/server.py uses synchronous requests (init_storage/put_object/get_object) inside async request handlers; this can block the event loop in production traffic.
backend/server.py hardcodes APP_STORAGE_PREFIX instead of sourcing from environment configuration.
frontend/src/pages/studio-page.jsx is oversized (824 lines), violating maintainability guideline.
test_credentials: No auth flow tested. /app/memory/test_credentials.md exists but contains no credentials entries.
seed_data_creation: Added persisted UI test media items to project neon-heist via Studio (one URL PDF title TEST_UI_MEDIA_URL and one uploaded image test-ui-upload.png).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public URL used: https://neon-portfolio-137.preview.emergentagent.com. Backend regression now includes media API tests (7 total pytest tests passed). UI automation validated both desktop and mobile project-open behavior and Studio media workflows.
rca of the issue: No functional bug reproduced in requested scope. Code-review risks identified: async handler blocking risk due to sync HTTP client and hardcoded storage prefix configuration.
